_note: ENGINE-OWNED DEATH TEST (B1, 'leave-at-1'). New lever MinHpFloor=1: our HP write never goes below 1, so it can NEVER create a zombie. FinalDamageFormula=9999 makes every observed hit 'lethal' -> our write drops the target to 1 HP. The engine's own (neutered) chip on the NEXT hit takes it 1->0 and the ENGINE kills it for real; we detect the observed 0 and skip rewriting it ([REWRITE-SKIP-DEATH]). TEST: with a basic (neutered) weapon attack, hit the SAME full-HP target TWICE. Hit 1 -> it drops to 1 HP (log [REWRITE ...->1]). Hit 2 -> it should DIE for real (KO/crystal, NOT zombie) and log [REWRITE-SKIP-DEATH]. Requires the neuter data mod deployed. AffectAllies+AffectFoes both true, so any target works.
